diffs.diff:
--- a/model.py
+++ b/model.py
@@ -12,39 +12,44 @@
 

     def forward(self, x):

         p = self.pad

-        # circular pad longitude (last dim)

         x = F.pad(x, (p, p, 0, 0), mode='circular')

-        # replicate pad latitude

         x = F.pad(x, (0, 0, p, p), mode='replicate')

         return self.conv(x)

 

 

 class ResBlock(nn.Module):

-    def __init__(self, ch):

+    def __init__(self, ch, drop=0.0):

         super().__init__()

         self.c1 = PeriodicConv2d(ch, ch, 3)

         self.c2 = PeriodicConv2d(ch, ch, 3)

         self.n1 = nn.GroupNorm(8, ch)

         self.n2 = nn.GroupNorm(8, ch)

+        self.drop = nn.Dropout2d(drop) if drop > 0 else nn.Identity()

 

     def forward(self, x):

         h = F.silu(self.n1(self.c1(x)))

+        h = self.drop(h)

         h = self.n2(self.c2(h))

         return F.silu(x + h)

 

 

 class WeatherCNN(nn.Module):

-    def __init__(self, in_ch=6, out_ch=2, hidden=128, n_blocks=8):

+    def __init__(self, in_ch=6, out_ch=2, hidden=128, n_blocks=8, drop=0.0, residual=True):

         super().__init__()

+        self.residual = residual

         self.stem = PeriodicConv2d(in_ch, hidden, 3)

-        self.blocks = nn.ModuleList([ResBlock(hidden) for _ in range(n_blocks)])

+        self.blocks = nn.ModuleList([ResBlock(hidden, drop=drop) for _ in range(n_blocks)])

         self.head = PeriodicConv2d(hidden, out_ch, 3)

 

     def forward(self, x):

-        # x: [B, 3, 2, 32, 64] -> [B, 6, 32, 64]

+        # x: [B, 3, 2, 32, 64]

         B = x.shape[0]

-        x = x.reshape(B, -1, x.shape[-2], x.shape[-1])

-        h = self.stem(x)

+        last = x[:, -1]  # [B, 2, 32, 64] - last input snapshot (normalized)

+        flat = x.reshape(B, -1, x.shape[-2], x.shape[-1])

+        h = self.stem(flat)

         for blk in self.blocks:

             h = blk(h)

-        return self.head(h)

+        delta = self.head(h)

+        if self.residual:

+            return last + delta

+        return delta
